summary: The available literature lacks any documented association linking arsenic exposure directly to diabetes mellitus in Swedish art glass workers; all supporting claims are based on broader population-level observations involving other industries or geographic regions rather than targeted research within this specific workforce. Therefore, due to absence of concrete empirical support tailored to these individuals, the causal relationship cannot be established.
